Understanding is where healing begins.

I.Private Psychotherapy Practice

The Quiet Mind is a private psychotherapy practice offering considered, evidence-based care for children, individuals, working professionals, and groups. Every session begins the same way — with being truly heard.

Now accepting new clients
About the practice

A quiet, considered space to work through what matters.

The Quiet Mind offers individual, child, and group therapy grounded in warmth and clinical care. Sessions are held virtually or in person, and every plan is shaped around what you actually need — whether that's a single conversation or ongoing support.

Booking is simple: choose a session below and continue directly to WhatsApp to confirm a time.

Your therapist

Jane Doe

Licensed Clinical Psychologist, MSc

I started The Quiet Mind because I believe therapy should feel like a conversation with someone who genuinely sees you — not a clinical checklist. Over the past several years I've worked with children, individuals, and groups, and I still find every session a privilege to be part of.

Confidential by design

How it works

Three steps to your first session

1

Choose a session

Browse child, personal, work, or group sessions above and pick what fits your current need.

2

Message on WhatsApp

Tap book — it opens WhatsApp with your session type ready to send, no forms to fill in.

3

Confirm your time

We'll reply with available times and confirm your session, virtual or in person.

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions, answered

Not sure? That's completely normal. Here's a quick guide:

  • Personal Therapy – For anxiety, relationships, self-esteem, or simply needing a quiet space to think things through.
  • Work & Career – For burnout, workplace pressure, career transitions, or feeling professionally stuck.
  • Child Therapy (Ages 8–12) – A gentle, play-informed space for children making sense of big feelings, behaviour, or change.
  • Group Sessions – A guided, confidential circle to connect with others who understand what you're going through.

Still unsure? Send us a message on WhatsApp. We're happy to help you choose the right session with no pressure.

The first session is simply a conversation. There's no test, no judgment, and no pressure.

We'll introduce ourselves, talk about what brought you here, and give you the opportunity to share as much — or as little — as you feel comfortable with. It's a chance for us to get to know each other and see whether the support feels like a good fit for you.

Absolutely.

We understand that speaking to someone new on camera can feel overwhelming. If you're more comfortable starting by text, that's completely okay. We can begin through chat and only move to video when you feel ready.

Your comfort always sets the pace.

Once your appointment is confirmed, we'll email you a private, secure video link.

At your scheduled time, simply click the link to join. Sessions are confidential and are never recorded.

Yes.

If your plans change, simply send us a message on WhatsApp. We understand that life happens. We only ask that you let us know as early as possible so we can offer your appointment time to someone else.

Yes.

Your privacy is protected by professional ethical standards and applicable law. Everything you share during your sessions remains confidential between you and your therapist, except where disclosure is legally required to protect someone's safety.

Feel free to reach out on WhatsApp at any time.

There is no wrong way to start. We're available 24/7, and we typically reply within 1–4 hours to answer your questions and help confirm your booking.

Still have a question? Reach out on WhatsApp — we're happy to help.

Get in touch

Ready to begin? Send a message.

Have a question before booking a session, or unsure which one fits? Reach out directly on WhatsApp — there's no wrong way to start.
